author: Lisa Lightfoot
review: i usually detest going out for a coffee as i find the performance of being a specialised wheelchair user manoeuvring doors tables queues etc really difficult to manage visiting the starbucks at the mri however was a trip i will gladly repeat my daughter and i were greeted at the door by a very happy and friendly lady who opened the door and greeted us both with a compliment then as we queued she came over to us and asked very politely and discreetly if we were staying in or taking out and when we replied with staying in she then said she would sort out a table for me which was then sorted to suit my needs now she wasnt the only member of staff who helped us out that day i noted that every member of staff was really polite helpful and genuinely engaged with the customer usually if someone is trying to be as helpful as they were it can come over as a pitying or patronising manner but not in this store at the end of the visit i asked one of the baristas if he knew the name of the lady who had held the door open and helped me out to which i was told oh you mean elaine yes shes our manager and shes great so from beginning to end we had great service great coffee and people who genuinely seemed to enjoy working there as a team elaine if you read this you and your team made my day so thank you

author: vietlinhdayne
review:
i carried a pret cup walked into this starbucks and just ordered a large vanilla matcha latte at this starbucks

its not my first time here but it is definitely my last time being a starbucks customer

all the staff the staff who took my order  and the staff who made the latte were decent and lovely expected one

there was a staff and who was not wearing any uniform or nametag so i didnt know what her position there for now i called her a

i asked for a cup holder cause i cant carry two cups a once the other staff was making another drink so he asked a to bring me a cup holder a said quote on quote no the other one you didnt buy from here so i cant give it to you i was silenced for a moment because i didnt know what to say and she continued cant sorry

to that woman a who treated me so badly today

i do not know what happened to you that makes you a grumpy person like today but i hope everything is going to be fine for you madam

its just a cup holder and if i had asked for an ice cup you could have given me the cup holder already but i didnt i chose to leave arguing with a person who thinks that i took advantage of the store by asking for one paper cup holder would just make me more miserable if i learned that buying giving me a cup holder because i carried both pret  starbucks cup got you into trouble i wouldnt ask for it but we all knoe that you are not into any trouble by giving me just a paper cup holder

i dont know if you treated me like that because of my look or my background  but i dont think you would done that with a local

i think that you found yourself lucky by bullying me with that attitude because it would not end up like that with another single person

for those who read this and think its just a cup holder get over it then exactly its just a cup holder how can one be so disrespectful and unpleasant attitude

even though i have a pretty monthly subscription i still come to starbucks and buy drinks but from now on i dont think that will be the case anymore

for anyone craving for good matcha latte and a nice atmosphere cafe at cheaper prices id recommend federal which is also based in oxford road

starbucks will still be my favourite brand afterwards but you madam a i suggest you get rid of that way of treating people thinking you are solving a problem

being flexible and treating people with love is how we work in this industry you might change the place you work for but if that attitude remains and runs deep i am sure starbucks will not just lose  customer

for the other staff that stay silenced the whole time i think you should have said something but bottomline i understand its not your fault and you are buying and making drinks

author: Pasha Melli
review:
extremely hot coffee and poor customer service

i visited the starbucks in whitworth street west and had an unpleasant experience that warrants a onestar rating i ordered my usual coffee but once again it was served far too hot making it impossible to drink this is not the first time this has happened with the same barista  chad when i politely pointed out that the coffee was excessively hot the baristas solution was to pour it into another cup creating a double layer this did nothing to solve the actual problem the coffee remained scalding and undrinkable

to make matters worse when i expressed my dissatisfaction i was met with an unprofessional and dismissive attitude instead of addressing the issue or offering to remake the drink at a more reasonable temperature i was told that my feedback was unwelcome

this level of customer service is unacceptable and i hope the management takes note of this incident serving coffee at a dangerously high temperature and then refusing to handle customer complaints properly is not what i expect from starbucks

author: Adithya
review:
from a person who basically gets starbucks every other day i definitely wouldnt visit this place despite it being  mins away from my house

ordered an iced brown sugar oat shaken espresso with less ice and hazelnuts syrup  my standard order ever since oat shaken espresso was introduced a few years back

the barista messed up the order putting too much ice in it i did contemplate asking them about it as im not that confrontational and even walked back briefly

but since it was a cold december day i politely reminded them that it had too much ice in it while the order mentioned little ice in it

the barista to my shock was very much annoyed with this simple request and just poured my coffee into a new cup and gave it back to me which wasnt even half the size of the tall drink that i ordered minus the syrup which stayed in the old cup

i mean the whole point of ordering oat shaken espresso is that its shaken and not mixed like a bad looking cold nescafe forcing myself i asked them again if this is what id be getting the annoyed barista snapped back saying this is what i get for ordering without ice and if i wanted more i shouldve ordered with ice

yeah cool if i wanted that attitude and this drink i wouldve made myself a nescafe at home i just dont understand how every other starbucks has been making it right for the past  years

i mean if this can be called a tall oat shaken espresso whats stopping us from calling the earth flat huh  it was  pm on a saturday so it wasnt even a busy time maybe for bunnys next door but definitely not here

author: J
review:
one of the worst starbucks experiences i have had in a long time the staff during a busy morning are under pressure and because of this do not read the drinks orders correctly

admittedly my order is complex but very few times does it ever go wrong  until this fateful morning it had to be remade twice and even on the rd time it still wasnt as i wanted but i had to go to a meeting i am not from this city so i really needed things to be right first time on my business trip

each time i tried to get my drink remade i was made to feel it was my mistake i asked for a chai latte with espresso shots and when there were none i was told the chai latte doesnt have coffee in it until i pointed to the label which clearly showed i asked for it to be added i also mentioned it is supposed to be wet but when i sent it back a second time i was told i have used a spoon to take the foam off despite it being a good inch of foam on top

the attitude is not great and the girls spend the whole time chatting about how they wanted extra shifts master the basics first and they may get more shifts in future

author: Ahmed Alattar
review:
ive been a loyal starbucks customer for years even when others decided to boycott the brand unfortunately my recent experiences at the birmingham new street branch have left me quite disappointed due to the behavior of one of the employees afyia

on multiple occasions ive noticed that she rarely smiles or makes an effort to be welcoming it often feels like customers are not valued when shes around today was the tipping point she came outside to collect chairs and tables but instead of politely asking customers to move she raised her voice and demanded excuse me were going to take the chairs inside now the tone was aggressive and commanding which made me and others feel extremely uncomfortable

what bothered me most was that there were plenty of other chairs available that could have been taken first but she felt the need to target a few customers and rush them in such an impolite way there was no reason for this kind of behavior basic courtesy goes a long way and its disheartening to see this lack of professionalism especially at a place like starbucks where customer service should be a priority

great coffee is available everywhere these days but customer service is what sets businesses apart i hope starbucks addresses this issue at the birmingham new street branch as its not the experience i expect from a brand ive been loyal to for years

author: Zara
review:
i recently visited starbucks and ordered my usual coffee and some food im quite an anxious person especially around people so even simple things like paying can make me nervous when i was entering my card pin i somehow mistyped it two or three times and i started to feel really embarrassed because there was a long queue behind me

but one of the staff members i believe her name was afia a lovely girl wearing a black scarf and black uniform was so kind and patient with me she calmly told me its okay take your timewhen my card didnt work the third time i said i didnt know what went wrong and was about to leave but she said to me its fine its on us today
that small act of kindness honestly made my day in a world where kindness feels rare she showed genuine compassion and understanding when she didnt have to she couldve easily just refused to serve me but instead she went out of her way to make sure i felt cared for
after finishing my drink i went back to thank her personally and wished her all the best in life i truly pray she earns everything good happiness success and prosperity and a lot of money because she deserves it god bless her

author: Oluwafemi Olajide
review:
i stepped into starbucks and immediately the atmosphere felt like a warm embrace the staff wearing smiles as their uniform made me feel like a cherished guest from the very moment i walked in i knew this was going to be a delightful experience

let me tell you about the almond croissant  a heavenly creation with a flaky crust that seemed to melt in my mouth the almond cream filling was like a secret treasure rich and velvety this wasnt just a pastry it was a work of art carefully crafted to perfection

but the surprises didnt stop there the banana caramel muffin was a symphony of flavors  sweet banana dancing with luscious caramel and that topping it wasnt just a topping it was like a delicious crown adding a crunch that was incredibly satisfying believe me this treat is a journey you wont want to miss

then there was the blueberry muffin  a burst of tangy and sweet berries in every bite the sugarcrusted top was like a sweet secret waiting to be discovered with every mouthful i couldnt help but close my eyes and savor the blissful moment

the pain au chocolat was a rendezvous with sophistication with each bite it was like i was transported to a charming french caf the fusion of flavors was like a dance of elegance and comfort in my mouth

and lets not forget the chocolate twist  it was like a playful game of hide and seek with chocolate surprises every twist revealed a burst of cocoa goodness and it was perfect for anyone with a love affair with chocolate

so heres my advice plan a visit to starbucks indulge in these delightful creations and then come back to thank me for introducing you to this world of taste and wonder your taste buds will thank you

author: Barry James
review:
i come here regularly i like coming here as it is open late closing at pm

i noticed that the toilet downstairs had been closed off leaving the disabled toilet for the entire pretty full cafe this was about pm

after few hot chocolates i needed the loo the disabled toilets were busy so i asked for the code from the staff to be told that it was closed for cleaning and that i would need to use the disabled toilet i advised the young lady that it was in use i was told told with a shrug  that i would just have to wait

as someone who has quite severe ahem  digestive issues i was too embarressed to make a big deal out of it the young lady in question has no idea how close it came to them having a much more serious cleaning issue as i waited the toilet was not opened again

i have worked in hospitality extensively from uk to new zealand and i have never spoke  to any customer the way i was spoke n to today i have never given an all  star review of a a cafe ever all because the manager or whoever took the decision to close a legally required facility  hours early

im not sure ill be back

author: Htet Kyaw
review:
the coffee served at this branch is satisfying and meets expectations in terms of flavor and quality additionally it offers free wifi access which is very convenient with an easytonavigate login process that enhances the customer experience

the availability of power sockets is a plus particularly for those looking to work or charge their devices however not all tables have access to these sockets which can be inconvenient expanding access to power sockets would greatly improve the usability of the space for customers

one area for improvement is cleanliness the tables are not cleaned promptly after customers leave which detracts from the overall atmosphere it would be better if staff ensured tables were tidied immediately during my visit the tissue supply was empty which may or may not be a consistent issue but its something to monitor servicewise the waiting time for orders is noticeably which can be frustrating improving service speed would help align this branch with the higher standards often found in other regions

similarly the toilet cleanliness is subparacceptable but not ideal finally the business hours could use some adjustment extending hours would make the caf more accessible for latenight or earlymorning customers

overall while starbucks maintains its reputation for decent coffee and useful amenities there are several areas for improvement that would elevate the experience significantly

author: Mark Stringer
review:
i was a regular at this coffee shop before the refurbishment

ive got two problems with the new layout and decoration

 noise the new interior has tiles on the floor and mostly hardwood furniture the noise even when there are only a few customers in the cafe is extremely distracting the curved window of which more in a minute always resulted in some weird acoustics but now that there are no wooden floors the noise levels are very high and distracting

 light one of the great aspects of the old decor in this starbucks was that there were deskstyle tables next to the curved shopfront window these were under the skylight so allowed customers to sit and use their computers in diffuse natural light

suggestions for improvement

 hang noise reducing things from the ceiling put tapestries on the walls a big ask but it would make the space a lot more inhabitable

 move the furniture around so at least some of the desks are up against the shop front window in the natural light

author: emily peyton
review:
i want to make clear this low rating is not reflective at all of the coffee or the service or staff at this coffee shop who couldnt be better starbucks food has never been the best but coffee and in this store the staff are brilliant

no the low rating is based purely on the moronically loud music now played in this starbucks which makes it impossible to work here which many people do and even talk sometimes why coffee shops have to play music with heavy base is beyond me it isnt a bar it isnt a club this base boost was obviously added when they did the recent refurb

and on that note the recent refurbishment which no doubt cost an arm and a leg made this erstwhile very pleasant coffee shop feel smaller more garishly bright and offers far less flexible seating options

i used to really love coming here but today was my last time im now relegated to using the tiny starbucks in the shopping centre where the music is at a sane volume

why when they change things do they so often ruin them

review:
i am absolutely appalled by the service i received from angelina the store manager my experience was not just disappointingit was infuriating i was spoken to with a level of rudeness and disregard that is completely unacceptable in any customer service setting i simply asked for a plastic cup with ice so i could share water with my daughter after purchasing a double espresso and a large bottle of still water angelina flatly refused my reasonable request showing zero flexibility or understanding

author: What you need to know!
review:
overall 

not the exactly the flagship starbucks this cold dirty and unclean starbucks is however conveniently located directly opposite wimbledon station its very transient in feel which isnt very nice and the staff not particularly into their jobs not some where youd consider a destination of any sorts to meet someone for a coffee and catch up

starbucks is often reviled about their coffee but its actually very good to be fair especially the blonde roast what is terrible is their food their plastic wrapped croissants are a disgrace yes they arrive in plastic and are unwrapped for show

food coffee with run of the mill substandard pastries

what i liked

 coffee blonde roast americano
 location directly opposite wimbledon station

what i didnt like

 untidy bordering dirty set up
 busy cold atmosphere
 understaffed
 indifferent service
 heavy on the smokers lingering outside
 filthy tables

do i recommend going not really
will i go again probably
was it good value yes
price point

author: Mark Stringer
review:
i was a regular at this coffee shop before the refurbishment

ive got two problems with the new layout and decoration

 noise the new interior has tiles on the floor and mostly hardwood furniture the noise even when there are only a few customers in the cafe is extremely distracting the curved window of which more in a minute always resulted in some weird acoustics but now that there are no wooden floors the noise levels are very high and distracting

 light one of the great aspects of the old decor in this starbucks was that there were deskstyle tables next to the curved shopfront window these were under the skylight so allowed customers to sit and use their computers in diffuse natural light

suggestions for improvement

 hang noise reducing things from the ceiling put tapestries on the walls a big ask but it would make the space a lot more inhabitable

 move the furniture around so at least some of the desks are up against the shop front window in the natural light

review:
i want to make clear this low rating is not reflective at all of the coffee or the service or staff at this coffee shop who couldnt be better starbucks food has never been the best but coffee and in this store the staff are brilliant

no the low rating is based purely on the moronically loud music now played in this starbucks which makes it impossible to work here which many people do and even talk sometimes why coffee shops have to play music with heavy base is beyond me it isnt a bar it isnt a club this base boost was obviously added when they did the recent refurb

and on that note the recent refurbishment which no doubt cost an arm and a leg made this erstwhile very pleasant coffee shop feel smaller more garishly bright and offers far less flexible seating options

i used to really love coming here but today was my last time im now relegated to using the tiny starbucks in the shopping centre where the music is at a sane volume

why when they change things do they so often ruin them

review: i came in a couple of weeks ago i ordered an iced vanilla latte with coconut milk first the man at the counter was sighing and rolling his eyes talking to his coworker and barely listening to my order however he charged me the typical price i pay for this so i went to wait for my coffee as i was walking away they asked my name which i repeated three times its nicole so not that difficult and then as im waiting many people have come and gone with their coffees there is a hot vanilla latte with the name ro on it so i asked if that was meant to be mine a woman stepped in and asked if it was meant to be iced and with coconut milk i said yes then she lifted up a coffee that seemed to be half finished and said she thought that was mine so i waited then i watched them pour regular dairy into the cup which i cannot drink so i said is that coconut milk they binned it and started gossiping to eachother while making me a new one so at this point ive been waiting about  minutes and being treated like absolute trash for no reason i have been a barista before this is not a hard order so she finally puts my coffee down and turns to another customer who has also been waiting and says i might have grabbed his coffee instead of mine meanwhile that coffee that was there in the first place was there before he even walked in the door i said to the lady this was not my fault and that i made a simple order with three different baristas as im walking out of the shop i take a sip and realise there is no vanilla i just threw it in the bin what a waste of my time and money you guys really need some education on basic customer service and basic listening skills i am english it is not like i had a difficult accent to understand or wasnt english speaking at all at any of my jobs in hospitality they wouldnt stand for this type of behaviour absolutely ridiculous

author: J Bateman
review:
quite possibly the dirtiest and most depressing starbucks in london congratulations this branch urgently needs a complete overhaul the establishments prime location opposite the ealing broadway tube station seems to have fostered complacency rather than excellence

from grimecovered tables to the general atmosphere of neglect its evident that this starbucks has seen better days the lack of cleanliness is unacceptable especially in a city where coffee culture is thriving and there are numerous other options for a quality brew the only thing this branch has going for it is its convenience for commuters but even that shouldnt justify the subpar conditions

the management appears to be nonexistent or grossly ineffective the solution is simple close the branch temporarily bring in a competent manager and start from scratch with so many lovely coffee shops in ealing theres no excuse for this starbucks to be the worst in the area

for now id recommend avoiding this starbucks and exploring the myriad of other delightful coffee spots in ealing save yourself the disappointment and seek out a place that values both its customers and its coffee

simple

a lovely big car park for the lovely customers of starbucks

very clear signage on lamp post and in windows of the store

do not believe the factually incorrect information you read online

review:
whilst walking past a starbucks in westfield   shepherds i thought i treat myself to a toastie  coffee as last time i checked in was about  months ago

at the till a member of staff advised me to top up my starbucks app on my phone instead of doing it at the till to get the reward points

typical now  starbucks wifi not working app crashes asking for an update the barcode scanner was tried about  times  beeps  hit and miss staff open a second till as now  tolls are required to sort this out

 minutes after  job done i head to find a table  i find one and its m apart from other people whilst the tables opposite are face to face  back to back seating

ive just started on the sandwich the moment staff approached me and said i am sitting at please dont use table and have to leave

i though ill ask if there are any free tables  obviously answer was no the coffee also wasnt right  full house of issues

haha what a mistake to turn into this starbucks and waste that much time and spend around  for a coffee and sandwich to get that needless to mention the new reward system wants you to spend  to get  free drink  this must be going downhill

thanks to some lovely young ladies that offered me a seat and decided to go

this place is shambles so to speak and i think i wont be making a mistake going to any starbucks again considering all the above

author: a h
review:
starbucks at highbury recently underwent a refurbishment and the new look is quite impressive during my visit the cafe wasnt very busy despite having three staff members on duty however i was disappointed to find that the tables were unclean which was surprising considering the presence of staff members

i ordered a cappuccino through the mobile app but unfortunately it did not meet the usual starbucks standard it was served extra hot even though i did not request it to be prepared that way this was a bit frustrating as it affected the overall taste and enjoyment of my drink

on the positive side the refurbished interior of the starbucks at highbury is visually appealing the modern decor and comfortable seating make it a pleasant place to relax and enjoy a cup of coffee the ambiance was calm and inviting allowing for a peaceful atmosphere to unwind or catch up with friends

despite the disappointment with the cleanliness of the tables and the temperature of my cappuccino the staff members were friendly and attentive they were quick to take my order and assist with any questions or requests i had their efficient service added a touch of professionalism to the overall experience

in conclusion the recently refurbished starbucks at highbury has a visually appealing interior but it falls short in terms of cleanliness and attention to detail the cappuccino i ordered was served at an extra hot temperature which was not to my liking however the friendly staff members made up for some of the shortcomings with a bit more focus on cleanliness and consistency in the preparation of drinks this starbucks location could provide a more enjoyable experience for its customers

author: Aaron Henriques
review:
in store the staff are good and most things are usually fine however for delivery orders theyre consistently poor

although the frequent fault of uber eats lack of ability to get a rider to the location it is in the control of the staff at starbucks to ensure that the hot drinks they allow to leave the premises when its collected  minutes after ordering does at least leave hot

ive yet again wasted over  on two drinks that were made  minutes before it was even collected by uber

if the staff have seen the drinks sat there for  minutes logic to me would say that they do not allow it to go out like that and instead they make it again when the rider turns up even better just do not make the order until they turn up

it happens so frequently there is no feedback mechanism and uber eats wash their hands of it if starbucks and uber were forced to provide refunds each time their ability to resolve this issue would swiftly improve

neither uber eats or starbucks corporation seem to care about product quality and standards and that trickles down to the end delivery point

author: Ricardo Roxo
review:
the starbucks at surrey quays shopping centre located at  surrey quays unit b london se ll is a popular spot among locals and shoppers due to its high foot traffic finding available seating can be challenging especially during peak hours the stores limited size contributes to this issue suggesting that an expansion could enhance customer comfort

while starbucks is renowned for its coffee quality some patrons have expressed concerns about the food offerings at this location specifically the value for money regarding food items such as the thinness of cake slices relative to their price has been a point of critique this indicates potential room for improvement in the food menu to meet customer expectations

in summary while the surrey quays starbucks maintains the brands standard for quality beverages addressing issues related to seating capacity and food value could significantly enhance the overall customer experience

review:
ive never been fond of starbucks their tea and coffee are both not very enjoyable but we were at canada water an hour early for an exhibition and the kids were hungry nothing else was open yet so we popped in here grabbed a croissant and cinnamon bun the bun was cold so asked if they could heat it up especially since its supposed to be served hot not to mention it wasnt the first thing in the world either was told they were not allowed to heat it up because it has the glaze on it the excuse was so silly and absurd i honestly couldnt even process it for a minute it would be like going to an italian restaurant and being served pasta this cold because they cant heat it up since it has sauce on it

author: Lili
review:
i ordered a lavender latte  via the app and went to the store to pick it up the app showed that my order was ready yet when i arrived the staff were busy making hot drinks for other customers i waited patiently for them to finish but when i finally asked about my order i was told that the lavender latte was unavailable shockingly i was informed that they could not process a refund and instead asked if i wanted to choose another drink

i agreed and selected a matcha latte large  the staff initially assumed the two drinks were the same price but i pointed out the  difference again i was told that their system could not refund the difference this is completely unacceptable and absurd for any serviceoriented business

after waiting over  minutes in total i finally received my matcha latte which turned out to be mostly foam i only realized this after i left the store i had to return and ask if they could remake

this experience was frustrating disappointing and a complete waste of my time i sincerely hope you will review your service processes and train your staff to handle such situations more professionally

review: my husband and i was traveling london two weeks ago on sept  around  pm after visiting westminster abbey and walking some hours around the thames my husband and i walked into o starbuck we got a coffee and sat by a table for a little rest just a few minutes after we we sat there and enjoyed coffee the young guy in the store came to us and said  we are closing the store in  minutes and he began to spray the tables near us for cleaning  obviously he told us to leave the store although we felt strange because starbuck stores in america never close so early we still got up and walked out of the store on their store glass wall we saw their business time it showed the store close at  but today when i check the o website and it shows this starbuck store operating time is actually from am to pm i feel quite outraged what they did to my husband and me definitely violates the business contract they dont have right to force us out of the store by telling a lie that they will close the store i hope starbuck will punish them for their arrogance and disrespect to customers and their violation to the business rules

review:
had a horrible time at this starbucks

i came in the shop and asked for the washroom they directed me to the disability bathroom as it was the only one available in the establishment i finished my business in there and found that there was no toilet paper not one single roll i was left stranded
i pull on the call assistance rope hoping to get one of the staff members attention but after pulling it down it was ignored for  minutes straight until i realised that it was broken a broken call assistance in a disability washroom is horrid to say the least

i powered on my almost dead phone and called the place hoping to get a staff members attention it rang for about a minute before someone answered as i explained my situation the person on the other end sounded uninterested and replied with a simple okay finally i was brough the toilet paper

afterwards i spoke to manager on dutysupervisor the one who answered the phone and told him what happened he gave me an unapologetic theres nothing we could do which is a shame as i understand the assistance rope cant be repaired that moment but the restocking of toilet paper needs to have better attention on it

felt totally embarrassed and helpless its going to be funny to look back on but felt extremely horrible in the moment either way  service cant talk about food or atmosphere so

review:
i stopped going to starbucks over a decade ago when i found out that they conduct their business in the uk but dont pay taxes in the country
occasionally i am invited for coffee and i cant refuse as it happened when i visited this branch in paddington station
the interior is quite run down to be honest the decor is dated and the tables and chairs were dirty and stained so i have had to clean up before i sat as nowadays the staff calls out for you to collect the drinks nobody cleans tablets anymore and i dont want to drink my coffee sitting on a pile of crap because the table was sticky like glue
the place is poorly lit and looks very cluttered i really didnt like it and i couldnt wait to get out
the atmosphere was miserable there was a woman with a huge dog sitting inside which is always a no no in a place serving food
i prefer pret  better service and drink selection

author: スタバカ（SUTABAKA）
review:
paddington station is the departure and arrival point for the heathrow express which connects london and heathrow airport
there is a starbucks at paddington station
its in a slightly hardtofind location so many people may not even notice it
within paddington station its location is relatively poor
also be aware that the ticket gates are completely different from those on the elizabeth line
although starbucks at paddington station is used by many people it is difficult to find so it is not often used and you should be able to find a seat without any problems

author: QiHan Li
review:
this was an unbelievably bad experience  honestly i left the store feeling shaken and kind of scared

i walked in just wanting an iced americano thats it instead i was greeted by an asian female staff member with one of the worst attitudes ive ever seen when i said my order she gave me this incredibly annoyed look stared at me like i was stupid and snapped what do you want like i was bothering her just by speaking i repeated my order and she mumbled something i couldnt quite catch when i politely asked her to repeat it she replied with this nasty sarcastic tone that honestly made me feel like i had committed some kind of crime just by asking for coffee

i didnt ask for anything weird i just wanted a basic drink normally id check her name tag so i could make a proper complaint  but i was genuinely afraid to even look at her again i kid you not i felt like if i stared too long she might actually hit me thats how hostile her energy was

i have no idea why she treated me that way  like i had personally offended her just by existing
and if she didnt want to serve me she couldve just said so  i wouldnt have cared
what really upset me was the way she chose to treat me with sarcasm hostility and honestly a vibe that felt borderline discriminatory

i walked out feeling humiliated and lowkey terrified im never coming back i dont need to be looked up and down talked down to and made to feel like trash when all i wanted was a damn iced coffee

hard pass never again

after not being able to go for a while we started going again roughly a month ago and i have noticed the staffs attitude they clearly do not enjoy any part of their jobs and it reflects on their service and the ones that are just talk and gossip usually leaving one employee begrudgingly doing everything else

incidentally i attended starbuck caledonian road today between am and am and had the exact same incident i regulary go to this starbucks and never hada problem before to be clear  bathroom out of order asked to please use the staff bathroom was told togo to the cafe at the other side of the road that there is no staff bathroom and claimed that staff also go elsewhere starbucks should review its staff policy be more transparent with custumers and definitely improve their inclusivity of people with specia needs chronic health conditions

author: Sir Khris (‘Kaptayn’)
review:
the starbucks at  leadenhall street london offers a convenient and comfortable spot for coffee and light snacks in the heart of the city of london its a popular location for both office workers and tourists given its proximity to major landmarks like leadenhall market and the lloyds building

customers frequently commend the friendly and efficient service with particular praise for the staffs attentiveness and ability to remember regulars orders the atmosphere is described as welcoming and comfortable making it a good place for a quick coffee break or a longer work session with free wifi

the quality of the beverages and food items is generally consistent with what one would expect from starbucks offering a range of coffees teas pastries and sandwiches regulars appreciate the reliability of their favorite drinks being made to standard and the availability of seasonal specials adds some variety throughout the year

the store operates from  am to  pm from monday to friday but is closed on weekends this schedule caters well to the working crowd in the financial district its location near major tube stations like monument and bank as well as several bus stops makes it easily accessible

overall this starbucks location is appreciated for its convenient location friendly staff and comfortable environment while it might not offer anything uniquely different from other starbucks it consistently delivers on the brands promise of quality and service making it a reliable choice for coffee in the city of london

author: Aaron
review:
this is a nice starbucks location on whitechapel rd i visited here daily during my recent trip to london due to it being located right next to my hotel on both occasions ordering my favourite iced pumpkin spice latte

on both occasions my drinks were very good the speed of service could have been slightly better although they can get pretty busy and id rather them take a little longer to make the drinks with effort and care which appeared to be the case here

the interior is comfortable and theres a good amount of seating and a nice feel around the cafe area

prices are in line with other starbucks locations in london a little more expensive than the rest of the uk but thats ok

it would have been nice to see them remain open a little better but there are other starbucks locations nearby so i can understand them wanting to close some stores early

as a regular visitor with my therapy dog i cannot speak highly enough of the outstanding treatment we receive from the dedicated staff each day we are greeted with warmth and respect making our visits truly enjoyable

recently we encountered an unfortunate situation where a disruptive man insisted my animal be removed the staff handled the situation with grace and professionalism calmly explaining starbucks dogfriendly policy despite facing unwarranted abuse and this man taking pictures of them and me they remained composed and focused on providing exceptional service

its evident that the team here goes above and beyond to create a welcoming environment for all customers including those with fourlegged friends their commitment to exemplary customer care shines through making each visit the highlight of my day
